title: Lido Staking - Open App
meta_description: lido staking routes ETH holders to the official Lido app to stake ETH, receive stETH, review withdrawals, and verify the domain.
hero_h2: Stake ETH, receive stETH, keep DeFi liquidity
hero_lead: lido staking opens the official Lido app for ETH holders who want to mint stETH, track rewards, and manage withdrawals from a self-custody wallet.
what_is: Lido is a family of liquid staking protocols, and Lido on Ethereum issues stETH when users stake ether, as described in the Lido tokens guide. The official app is the destination for staking ETH, wrapping stETH, and managing withdrawals.

how.d: Open the app only at stake.lido.fi and check the URL before connecting a wallet.
Use an Ethereum self-custody wallet and confirm you are on the intended network.
Choose the amount, review the stETH output, gas, and transaction request in your wallet.
Track stETH, wrap to wstETH if needed, or use the withdrawals tab when you want to exit.

points.p: When ETH is staked through Lido on Ethereum, users receive stETH, a transferable token balance tied to ETH withdrawable from the protocol.
The page should send users to stake.lido.fi, not a lookalike, wallet-draining clone, or unofficial staking form.
Liquid staking carries smart contract, validator, governance, market, and network risks; review official docs before signing transactions.

faq.q: Is lido staking the official Lido app?
faq.a: This landing page is not the app; the official action destination is https://stake.lido.fi/. Always verify the domain before connecting a wallet.

faq.q: How does lido staking work with stETH?
faq.a: You stake ETH through Lido on Ethereum and receive stETH, which represents ETH withdrawable through the protocol while remaining transferable across supported DeFi venues.

faq.q: Can I withdraw after lido staking?
faq.a: Yes, the official Lido app includes a withdrawals section for exiting stETH to ETH, subject to Ethereum network conditions and protocol mechanics.

faq.q: What wallet do I need for lido staking?
faq.a: Use a self-custody Ethereum wallet supported by the official app, keep enough ETH for gas, and review every wallet prompt before signing.

faq.q: What risks should I review before lido staking?
faq.a: Review smart contract, staking, validator, governance, liquidity, and market risks in the official Lido documentation before using the protocol.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify stake.lido.fi before connecting. Educational content only, not financial advice.
